    Enum ChartType

    Specifies the chart type.

    Namespace: Aspose.Cells_FOSS
    Assembly: Aspose.Cells.FOSS.dll
    Syntax
    public enum ChartType

    Fields

    Name Description
    Area

    Area chart.
    Area3D

    3D area chart.
    Bar

    Horizontal bar chart.
    Bar3D

    3D horizontal bar chart.
    BoxAndWhisker

    Box and whisker chart (chartex).
    Bubble

    Bubble chart.
    Column

    Vertical column chart.
    Column3D

    3D vertical column chart.
    Contour

    Contour (2D surface) chart.
    Doughnut

    Doughnut chart.
    Funnel

    Funnel chart (chartex).
    Histogram

    Histogram chart (chartex).
    Line

    Line chart.
    Line3D

    3D line chart.
    Map

    Map chart (chartex).
    Pie

    Pie chart.
    Pie3D

    3D pie chart.
    Radar

    Radar/spider chart.
    Scatter

    Scatter (XY) chart.
    Stock

    Stock (OHLC) chart.
    Sunburst

    Sunburst chart (chartex).
    Surface3D

    3D surface chart.
    SurfaceWireframe3D

    3D wireframe surface chart.
    Treemap

    Treemap chart (chartex).
    Unknown

    Unrecognised or unsupported chart type.
    Waterfall

    Waterfall chart (chartex).
